scenes.goal: Display version number prominently with release date
scenes.visual: Dark canvas (#0D1117). Giant version number 'v0.5.0' in accent blue (#58A6FF), centered. Release date in muted (#8B949E) below.
scenes.motion: Version number scales up from 0.5 to 1.0 with back.out(1.4). Date fades in after 0.5s delay.

scenes.goal: Highlight three new features with cards
scenes.visual: Three cards in a row. Each card: icon at top, feature name, one-line description. Cards have subtle border (#30363D) and hover-scale effect.
scenes.text:
What's new

Template Gallery — 10+ production-ready templates
Transcribe Pipeline — Audio to timed captions
Composition Variables — Parametrize and batch render
scenes.motion: Cards slide up sequentially (0.3s stagger). Icons glow on entrance. Card borders brighten on focus.

scenes.visual: Left column: checkmark list of improvements. Right column: fix count with bug icon. Animation palette from motion system.
scenes.text:
Improvements

✓ Faster scene rendering (40% speedup)
✓ Better error messages in CLI
✓ 12 new HyperFrames contract rules
✓ FPS default corrected to 30

🐛 8 bugs fixed
scenes.motion: Checkmarks animate in with spring. Bug count counts up from 0 to 8.

scenes.goal: Show upgrade command and link to full changelog
scenes.visual: Terminal window with upgrade command. Below: 'Full changelog →' link. Warm amber accent for terminal text.
scenes.text:
Upgrade now

npm install -g code2mp4@latest

Full changelog → github.com/code2mp4/code2mp4/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
scenes.motion: Terminal prompt appears with cursor blink. Command types out. Link fades in at bottom.
